title: AI's REAL Strength: Greenfield Projects, Not Legacy Code! #shorts
summary: AI is effective at building greenfield projects from scratch but faces significant challenges integrating into legacy systems. Poor documentation and system complexity create obstacles that hinder AI performance even in sophisticated systems.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that AI coding tools perform best on greenfield projects built from scratch and struggle when asked to integrate into legacy systems. The core obstacles are poor documentation and system complexity, which hinder AI performance even within sophisticated codebases. The takeaway is a distinction between the two settings: starting clean plays to current AI strengths, while existing systems expose its limits.
